blended.narrative: Mount Washington is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,637 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
